simulation_notes: Run JSONL was constructed by hand for pilot test of audit format, not produced by a real retrieval system. Chunks_subset is a paraphrased illustrative reconstruction of Fluent Python ch1-2 fragments, not extracted from the real PDF. Use this manifest only to validate that audit_v0 schema and pilot protocol work end-to-end. Do not use these numbers in any report or gate decision.
notes: Pilot v0.2.1 — Q-known-hit only. Q22 and Q7 deferred until either real run data is available, or scope of synthetic test bed is expanded explicitly.
